title: TypeScript Fetch – HTTP Requests with Types

meta.title: TypeScript Fetch – Type-Safe HTTP Requests (2026)
meta.description: Master the Fetch API in TypeScript with full type safety. Learn to handle responses, errors, and JSON data with proper typing.

content.value: The Fetch API provides a modern interface for making HTTP requests in the browser and Node.js. TypeScript enhances it with type safety for responses and error handling.

value: **Using any type** instead of proper interfaces

content.value: TypeScript with Fetch API provides type-safe HTTP communication, reducing runtime errors and improving developer productivity. Always define interfaces for your data shapes and implement proper error handling.

faq.question: How to type fetch response?
faq.answer: Use interfaces with async/await and type assertions.

faq.question: How to handle errors?
faq.answer: Check response.ok and use try/catch blocks.

faq.question: How to set headers?
faq.answer: Use headers option in fetch config.
